description_long: This object is a realistic model of a crab, specifically resembling a fiddler crab, with a robust, rectangular cephalothorax and a pair of prominent claws, one of which is significantly larger and more brightly colored than the other. The carapace is mottled brown with subtle orange and tan highlights, while the legs are slender, jointed, and covered in fine textures, giving a lifelike appearance. The larger claw is a vivid orange-red with a creamy white tip, contrasting with the smaller, more subdued claw. The crab's eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front corners of the carapace, providing a wide field of view. The legs are splayed outward, with visible segmentation and fine details on the joints and tips. The overall surface appears hard and slightly rough, typical of a crustacean exoskeleton.
description: A lifelike crab with a brown, textured carapace and one oversized orange-red claw, featuring detailed legs and eyes on short stalks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular carapace, both claws (with the larger claw on the right), and all legs splayed outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the massive orange-red claw and the crab's body depth, with the smaller claw and legs partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carapace, both claws extending forward, and the segmentation of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the smaller claw and the detailed articulation of the legs, with the large claw partially obscured.
